title: Comparing Your Real Options for Selling Software Without a Stripe Account That Actually Works
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: If you’re in Nigeria, Pakistan, or Ghana, selling software without Stripe or PayPal feels impossible. Both platforms block entire countries, leaving creators stranded. Gumroad and Payhip rely on these processors, so they’re no help either. Even if you’re approved, banking restrictions or KYC demands kill your chances. Crypto-native infrastructure is the only permanent solution, but not all options are equal. Here’s a direct comparison of what works—and what doesn’t—for selling software in restricted regions.
What Each Option Actually Offers

PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip offer all-in-one platforms for digital sales, but only if you’re in an approved country. They handle payments, delivery, and basic analytics. Crypto alternatives like Unchained Commerce’s Core Shop Engine ($49.99) provide backend infrastructure without relying on third-party processors. Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) adds frontend integration for 300+ coins. The Full Stack Bundle ($79.99) combines everything, including priority updates and Discord support. Traditional platforms win for simplicity—if you’re allowed to use them. Crypto wins for global access and no KYC, but requires more setup.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal and Stripe explicitly block countries like Nigeria, Iran, and Venezuela due to regulatory or risk concerns. Gumroad and Payhip inherit these restrictions because they use Stripe or PayPal. Crypto-native solutions like Unchained Commerce bypass these blocks entirely. NOWPayments processes 300+ coins without KYC, and the Core Shop Engine automates delivery regardless of location. Traditional platforms fail here. Crypto infrastructure is the only option for creators in restricted regions—no exceptions, no workarounds.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

PayPal and Stripe charge 2.9% + $0.30 per transaction, with payouts taking 2–7 days. Gumroad and Payhip add their own fees on top. Crypto payments via NOWPayments cost 0.5% per transaction, with instant or near-instant settlements. Unchained Commerce’s one-time fees ($49.99–$79.99) give lifetime access, while traditional platforms charge monthly subscriptions. Crypto wins on fees and speed but requires buyers to pay in crypto. Traditional platforms win for fiat convenience—if you can use them.
PayPal and Stripe block entire countries, leaving crypto as the only global solution.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Gumroad and Payhip automate delivery but require Stripe or PayPal integration. Unchained Commerce’s Core Shop Engine automates delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts without any processor account. The Admin Dashboard ($29.99) adds transaction logs and real-time analytics. Traditional platforms are smoother for beginners, but crypto infrastructure offers full automation without geographic restrictions. If you’re blocked, crypto is your only automated solution.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

If you’re in a Stripe- or PayPal-approved country, traditional platforms are simpler. If you’re in Nigeria, Iran, or Venezuela, they’re not an option. Crypto-native infrastructure like Unchained Commerce’s Full Stack Bundle ($79.99) is the only permanent solution. It’s more work to set up, but it gives you global access, no KYC, and lifetime ownership. If you’re blocked, crypto isn’t just better—it’s your only choice.
